list.name: Changes
list.comment: MediaPlayerTest excluded from tests on some time

changelist.name: Changes
changelist.comment: Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow

task.summary: Hitmos.java parsing from server html fixed
Fixed bug with stretch list cell ass
Fixed bug with blocking thread close in netty track processing
Intro sound relocated to self class
Added new logo path to resources
Anvil mods load updated to ignoring module-info and throwable exceptions
Added progress bar to initialize splash window
Added json localization messages to splash window
Added json parse method to FileManager
Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow
Added multiply themes in res directory for load in ResourceManager
Design updated and added cursorus for future
DI added to ResourceManager and LocalizationManager
History and another classes minor refactored
Added to biggest time to assert in MediaPlayerTest
MediaPlayerTest excluded from tests on some time

MESSAGE.value: Metadata.fxml view designed to always grow
Added multiply themes in res directory for load in ResourceManager
Design updated and added cursorus for future
DI added to ResourceManager and LocalizationManager
History and another classes minor refactored
Added to biggest time to assert in MediaPlayerTest
MediaPlayerTest excluded from tests on some time

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: MediaPlayerTest excluded from tests on some time
